news_items.headline: Will Oracle's AI Gamble Pay Off This Quarter?
news_items.summary: Oracle (NYSE: ORCL) is set to report its fiscal Q4 2026 earnings on Wednesday, June 10, after the market close. Heading into the results, the stock has experienced significant volatility, dropping 12.9% over the past week as investors weigh immense cloud growth against massive capital expenditures.

news_items.headline: Wall Street sees AI trade bearing fruit with MANGOS ahead of IPOs
news_items.summary: MANGOS — no, not the tropical stone fruit — is the latest Big Tech acronym to be at the top of investors' minds ahead of 2026's biggest IPOs. MANGOS consists of Meta Platforms (META), Anthropic (ANTH.PVT), Nvidia (NVDA), Alphabet (GOOG, GOOGL), OpenAI (OPAI.PVT), and SpaceX (SPCX, SPAX.PVT). Yahoo Finance Senior Business Reporter Ines Ferré explains the latest AI tech groupings being coined by Wall Street analysts.
